name: factorial
cpp_unit: long factorial(long n){ if(n<=1) return 1; return n*factorial(n-1); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", factorial(0)); printf("%ld
", factorial(1)); printf("%ld
", factorial(5)); printf("%ld
", factorial(10)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(factorial(0))
    print(factorial(1))
    print(factorial(5))
    print(factorial(10))

name: binary_search
cpp_driver:
int main(){ std::vector<long> data={1,3,5,7,9,11,13}; printf("%ld
", binary_search(data,7)); printf("%ld
", binary_search(data,1)); printf("%ld
", binary_search(data,13)); printf("%ld
", binary_search(data,8)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var data: List[Int] = [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13]
    print(binary_search(data, 7))
    print(binary_search(data, 1))
    print(binary_search(data, 13))
    print(binary_search(data, 8))

name: int_pow

int main(){ printf("%ld
", int_pow(2,10)); printf("%ld
", int_pow(3,0)); printf("%ld
", int_pow(5,3)); printf("%ld
", int_pow(7,4)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(int_pow(2, 10))
    print(int_pow(3, 0))
    print(int_pow(5, 3))
    print(int_pow(7, 4))
